title: Policy authorization closure and adversarial evidence
outcome: E09.S5.2 closes remaining S5.1 authorization-boundary gaps before native execution. Child Allow requires explicit MatcherKind::Command Allow (path Allow is constraint/provenance only — unknown git/gh/ontarch/mystery stay default_deny). PolicyEvaluationInput is resolver-owned via private from_resolved_selection on ResolveSuccess (no crate-wide multipart forge). Gate/Deny/contract emit PolicyFailurePlanSummary (argv/operands redacted). DualAllowProof is evaluator-private; PolicyEvaluationResult splits Contract/Rejected/Authorized; authorized emitters take AuthorizedExecutionPlan only. Schema/Ontarch/Rust parity: maxItems:0 allow/gate paths/actions, null≠absent, ID regex, uniqueItems. Program-aware rm/mv/cp -- and -t/--target-directory; option-prefixed Chezmoi apply → ShellMutation. Residual §5.7 evidence added: nine-combo layer reduction + public decision, command Allow + out-of-scope path Deny, longest-existing ancestor, permission-denied ancestor fail-closed. Still spawn-free; --execute → unavailable exit 10.
validation: PASS with pinned toolchain (rustc/cargo 1.96.0, moon 2.3.2): moon run takogami:build|test|lint|format-check; ontarch:sync|validate (takogami.agent in policies.json + agent→policy:takogami.agent edge); panoply:gen-check|validate-substrate; command-output schema diff identical; git diff --check clean. Lib 105 + policy_cli 17 + resolution_cli 27. Implementation landed in wfos 4ec6e86 (a341481..4ec6e86) plus residual matrix follow-ups. Historical ontarch:secrets-scan blocker preserved and excluded. Review-env Moon/Rust gap closed by re-running gates here.
decisions: Command authority and path scope are independent: has_command_allow gate in reduce_layer; path Allow never populates command grants.
Handoff construction is resolution-module-private from_resolved_selection; defensive assert_input_consistency remains defense-in-depth.
Policy failures use safe projection (program basename + correlation) — never serialize raw ResolvedCommand argv.
execution_authorized=true is renderable only from AuthorizedExecutionPlan; RejectedPolicyOutcome has no authorization setter.
Allow/gate paths and actions constrained to empty (maxItems:0) in schema and both validators.
Historical S5 and S5.1 session JSON left unchanged; S5.2 is a new correction record.
macOS may refuse non-UTF-8 filename create (illegal byte sequence); test treats OS refusal as already fail-closed.
handoff: E09.S6 must accept only AuthorizedExecutionPlan, use the injected Executor seam for real process spawn, persist RuntimeCommandRecord, and must not treat path Allow as command authority, forge PolicyEvaluationInput from independent parts, re-resolve, turn Gate into Allow, or serialize denied operands on failure paths.
blockers: ontarch:secrets-scan detect reports pre-existing age-secret-key in git history (commit a3a4978, 2026-06-24; redacted in HEAD, persists in blob) — not introduced by migration; human decision pending (history rewrite, .gitleaksignore entry, or accept as historical fixture)
token_note: STATE + S5.2 addendum + S5.1 addendum + S5 plan + last 2 session records vs full E09/Plan
